base_test_cfg
uvm_object
base_test_cfg

Container class for all configuration items not coming from the hardware toplevel.  They control test-level items such as clock frequencies, reset pulse duration, and coverage/SVA checking.

Variables
checks_enable
bit checks_enable

If 1, enables any defined internal SVA checks on the agents.

coverage_enable
bit coverage_enable

If 1, enables building and collection of any coverage defined by the agents or the env.

spi_clk_frequency
real spi_clk_frequency

Frequency in Hz that the SPI clock must run at. 10 kHz probably good for implementation, 2 MHz good for early simulation.

system_clk_frequency
real system_clk_frequency

The frequency in Hz that the system clock must run at. Eventually, set to be the same speed as they PCB oscillator and assume an internal PLL, so maybe 5-12 MHz is good.

reset_duration
real reset_duration

The duration in seconds that the reset pulse will last at the start of simulation.
